title: BEM-877 request v1.5
objective:
Create file governance/audit/mailbox/to_curator/BEM877_PROTOCOL_V15_REQUEST.md with content # BEM-877 PROTOCOL V1.5 REQUEST
Status: SENT_TO_CURATOR
Route: External GPT auditor -> Curator -> Worker -> Curator -> external mailbox
Objective: agree protocol v1.5 after operator review of v1.4.
Base: BEM872 v1.2, BEM875 v1.3, BEM876 v1.4, AI agents summary, Business Model Canvas source, operator dialogue.
Required fixes:
- Clickable TOC must be inside the table, not a separate link row.
- Replace role-object with object everywhere.
- Replace internal component with element everywhere. Curator, Analyst, Auditor, Executor are elements.
- Reduce duplication: define each key term once, then reference it.
- Remove low-value continuity table.
- Clarify managing contour: main repository plus system logic, architecture, rules, factory, support and upgrade center for product repos.
- Clarify testing: no permanent separate testing contour. Curator assigns one internal contour to testing workspace when needed.
- Use only рабочая область terminology: development workspace, testing workspace, main workspace.
- Clarify managed common channel: common channel includes global rulebook and rules written by Director/General Director; internal channels operate inside each object.
- Curator of Worker communicates only with Curator of Director for external object exchange.
- Product repos obey global rulebook and send experience feedback to managing contour.
- Optimize structure: fewer tables, no repeated definitions.
Required Worker output and Curator final response. Status APPROVED_WITH_NOTES or BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
No issue comments.
